2. Get.Longitudine() should return 45.0.

Title: Verify initial screen navigation
Expected Result:
1. Navigating through the initial screen to select state, region, and city should lead to the current position selection screen.
2. Selecting the current position should trigger the server request.
3. Server response should be presented on the final screen.

Title: Verify scroll down to update data
Expected Result: 1. Scrolling down on the initial map should update the map to the updated map.

Title: Verify suggestion button press
Expected Result: 1. Pressing the suggestion button should navigate to the suggestion screen.

Title: Verify application start sequence
Expected Result:
1. Starting the application should load countries.
2. Loading countries should trigger loading states.
3. Loading states should trigger loading regions.
4. Loading regions should trigger loading cities.
5. Loading cities should trigger fetching data from the server.
6. Server response should be handled and the main activity should be launched.

Title: Verify permission handling
Expected Result:
1. The application should request permission to access fine location.
2. If permission is granted, the application should continue to fetch data.
3. If permission is denied, the application should handle the denial and possibly prompt the user to grant permission.

Title: Verify widget enable and update
Expected Result:
1. Enabling the widget should trigger the widget provider to update the app widget.
2. Updating the app widget should retrieve data from the AirVisual API.
3. The retrieved data should be presented to the user.

Title: Verify user interaction with map activity
Expected Result:
1. The user should be able to interact with the map activity.
2. The map activity should use the AirVisual API to fetch and display data.

Title: Verify user decision flow
Expected Result:
1. The user should be able to decide the nation, region, and city of interest.
2. The position often FAQI of the city should be used to get consigliPerFAQI(int aq).
3. The data should be reformed accordingly. 

Note: Some test cases assume minimal details as they are not explicitly provided in the UML diagrams. These assumptions are kept to a minimum. <|end|>
